---
title: "Mathematical Foundations of Machine Learning"
---

This section collects notes on the mathematical foundations used in machine learning.
标签约定：`Definition` 表示定义，`Theory` 表示理论/定理，`Inference` 仅表示推导步骤，`Result` 表示结论或应用结论。

- [Orthogonality](1%20Orthogonality.md)
- [Nonlinear Dynamics](2%20Nonlinear%20Dynmaics.md)
- [Four Fundamental Subspaces](3%20Linear-Algebra%20Four%20Subspaces.md)
